data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate that all user input is sanitized/escaped, but the evidence does not provide any specific results or confirmations regarding the sanitization of user inputs. The expected result states that the scenario behavior should either be confirmed as supported or produce a clear failure report, but the evidence does not demonstrate that this validation was successfully executed. The lack of concrete evidence to support the sanitization claim leads to a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming that all user input is sanitized/escaped.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
